mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces borrowing costs and boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month CPI inflation rate above 2.5% triggers central bank rate hikes, increasing discount rates and reducing equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%, or the signal's Rank IC drops below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized increase in GDP growth (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) signals robust supply-side expansion and strong demand, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined effect of GDPC1 and INDPRO fails to predict SPX returns (Rank IC < 0.05) or the signal's predictive power collapses during recessions.

mechanism_narrative: A labor market tightness indicator (UNRATE < 4.5%) signals strong wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE falls below 4.5%, or the signal's Rank IC drops below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) reflects strong employment growth, boosting consumer confidence and corporate earnings, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to outperform baseline returns (t-test p > 0.05) despite PAYEMS growth, or the signal's Rank IC falls below 0.04.

mechanism_narrative: A housing starts surge (HOUST > 1200k units) indicates strong demand for residential construction, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances where HOUST exceeds 1200, or the signal's Rank IC drops below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence between rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) and stagnant rates (FEDFUNDS) signals central bank inaction, eroding real returns and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict SPX returns (Rank IC < 0.03) or the divergence between CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS does not correlate with negative returns.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production (INDPRO < 105) signals supply-side disruptions, increasing input costs and reducing corporate margins, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO falls below 105, or the signal's Rank IC drops below 0.02.
